events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May was born on this day in 1947.

angles.name: Brian May Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the iconic Brian May! His legendary guitar riffs with Queen continue to rock generations. What's your favourite Queen track?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' electrifying frontman Mick Jagger was born on this day in 1943.

angles.name: Mick Jagger Birthday
angles.copy: Still moving like Jagger at 83! Happy Birthday to the legendary Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger, whose energy remains unmatched.

events.title: MTV Launched
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first music video.

angles.name: MTV Launch Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember when MTV changed everything? 45 years ago today, 'Video Killed The Radio Star' ushered in a new era of music. Did you watch the launch?

events.title: Oasis released Definitely Maybe
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: It's 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed British music forever. What's your standout track from this Britpop classic?

events.title: Woodstock Festival Anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal event in music history, took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years ago today, hundreds of thousands gathered for '3 Days of Peace & Music' at Woodstock. An unforgettable moment in counterculture history.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's Death
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the 'King of Rock and Roll', passed away on this day in 1977. He would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: Elvis Death Anniversary
angles.copy: Remembering the King today. It's 49 years since the world lost Elvis Presley, whose music and influence remain eternal.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's Passing
events.blurb: Influential rapper Tupac Shakur passed away on this day in 1996. He would have been 55 this year.

angles.name: Tupac Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering Tupac Shakur, who left us 30 years ago today. His powerful lyrics and enduring legacy continue to resonate.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's Death
events.blurb: Legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix passed away on this day in 1970. He would have been 84 this year.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Tribute
angles.copy: 46 years ago, we lost a true guitar visionary. Remembering Jimi Hendrix, whose groundbreaking artistry continues to inspire.

events.title: The Beatles released Abbey Road
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road' was released in the UK on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: It's been 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That iconic album cover and timeless tracks still sound incredible today.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman Chrissie Hynde was born on this day in 1951.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 75th Birthday to the one and only Chrissie Hynde! Her voice and attitude with The Pretenders are truly legendary.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman Liam Gallagher was born on this day in 1972.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the rock 'n' roll swagger. What's your favourite Liam track?

events.title: John Lennon released Imagine
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released in the UK on this day in 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Release Anniversary
angles.copy: 55 years ago, John Lennon gave us 'Imagine' – a timeless anthem for peace and unity. Its message resonates as strongly today as ever.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on this day in 2001, revolutionising how we listen to music.

angles.name: iPod Launch Anniversary
angles.copy: Can you believe it's been 25 years since the first iPod was unveiled? It truly put '1,000 songs in your pocket' and changed everything.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th marks James Bond Day, celebrating the premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: James Bond Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Raise a martini (shaken, not stirred) to 007 and all the iconic theme tunes that have accompanied his adventures.

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: The visionary musician and songwriter John Lennon was born on this day in 1940.

angles.name: John Lennon Birthday Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message of peace continue to inspire the world.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary comedian and actor John Cleese was born on this day in 1939.

angles.name: John Cleese Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 87th Birthday to the utterly brilliant John Cleese! From Python to Fawlty Towers, a true comedy icon.

events.title: The Beatles released 'The White Album'
events.blurb: The Beatles released their self-titled double album, commonly known as 'The White Album', on this day in 1968.

angles.name: White Album Anniversary
angles.copy: 58 years ago, The Beatles unleashed 'The White Album' – a sprawling, diverse masterpiece. What's your favourite track from this landmark double LP?
